author: fdoljanin
body:
# HGCal displaced gun validations

#### PR description:

This PR improves HGCal Trackster validation by:

- adding displacement (`R` and `alpha`) and time metrics,
- fixing a segmentation fault when producing separate validation plots,
- making the association-score thresholds used for non-fake, merge, purity, and duplicate metrics configurable.

The output gains the new displacement and time plots. The default association thresholds preserve the previous metric definitions. This PR has no external dependencies.

#### PR validation:

Manually validated by running the displaced-particle-gun workflows and checking the resulting HGCal validation plots.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Not a backport.

This PR is part of a summer student project under the supervision of @bfonta.
title: HGCal displaced gun validations
